contents.markdown:
# ==This is title== ## 1. Text [Latin](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Latin) refers to an ancient Italic language originating in the region of Latium in ancient Rome. ## 2. Page Objects ### 2.1 Table Here's a sample table below, designed to be simple for easy understand and quick reference.
Table 1: This is a dummy table
Name Corp Remark
Foo
Bar Microsoft Dummy
### 2.2. Figure Here is a figure with some text ![Values 500 450 400 400 350 300 300 250 200 200 100 0 Jan Feb Mar Apr May Jun Months](figures/1.1 "Bar chart with vertical axis labeled 'Values' ranging from 0 to 500 in increments of 100. Horizontal axis labeled 'Months' with categories: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun. Bars and values: - Jan: 200 (orange) - Feb: 300 (green) - Mar: 400 (blue) - Apr: 450 (orange) - May: 350 (green) - Jun: 250 (blue)") ## 3. Others AI Document Intelligence is an AI service that applies advanced machine learning to extract ==text, key-value pairs, tables,== and structures from documents automatically and accurately. Turn documents into usable data and shift your focus to acting on information rather than compiling it. Start with prebuilt models or create custom models tailored to your documents both on premises and in the cloud with the AI Document Intelligence ==studio== or SDK. The custom extraction capabilities in AI Document Intelligence help you overcome this challenge by training on your own data based on just five documents. Not only is the first output more reliable and tailored to your needs, but it also allows you to provide human input to create a highly accurate model customized to your forms. $$\mathrm { M S E } = \frac { 1 } { n } \sum _ { i = 1 } ^ { n } \left( y _ { i } - \widehat { y } _ { i } \right) ^ { 2 }$$ [](https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/products/ai-services/ai-document-intelligence)

Summary.valueString: The document provides an overview of Latin as an ancient Italic language originating from Latium in ancient Rome. It includes a simple table listing names and corporations, a figure depicting a bar chart with monthly values, and a description of AI Document Intelligence, an AI service that uses machine learning to extract text, key-value pairs, tables, and structures from documents. The document also highlights the custom extraction capabilities of AI Document Intelligence, which allow training on a small number of documents to create accurate, tailored models.

paragraphs.content: Latin refers to an ancient Italic language originating in the region of Latium in ancient Rome.
Here's a sample table below, designed to be simple for easy understand and quick reference.
Table 1: This is a dummy table
Here is a figure with some text
AI Document Intelligence is an AI service that applies advanced machine learning

to extract text, key-value pairs, tables, and structures from documents automatically and accurately. Turn documents into usable data and shift your focus to acting on information rather than compiling it. Start with prebuilt models or create custom models tailored to your documents both on premises and in the cloud with the AI Document Intelligence studio or SDK.

The custom extraction capabilities in AI Document Intelligence help you overcome this challenge by training on your own data based on just five documents. Not only is the first output more reliable and tailored to your needs, but it also allows you to provide human input to create a highly accurate model customized to your forms.

figures.description:
Bar chart with vertical axis labeled 'Values' ranging from 0 to 500 in increments of 100.
Horizontal axis labeled 'Months' with categories: Jan, Feb, Mar, Apr, May, Jun.
Bars and values:
- Jan: 200 (orange)
- Feb: 300 (green)
- Mar: 400 (blue)
- Apr: 450 (orange)
- May: 350 (green)
- Jun: 250 (blue)

comments.message: This is a mock document used for showing Content Understanding features.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Document Intelligence Studio is an online tool to visually explore, understand, train, and integrate features into your applications. You can easily extract key data from documents or create your own custom models with a no-code approach.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Document Intelligence also supports figures, so this should be added to the feature list.
comments.author: Sample SDK Author

comments.message: Yes, I agree, and figure understanding is also on the way.
comments.author: Another SDK Sample Authoer
